mnemonics: B.A.D. Tech: Blockchain's Appetite is Demanding (high energy). AI's processing is Data-hungry (needs lots of power). IoT Devices are numerous, creating a mountain of e-waste.
keyPoints: Blockchain and cryptocurrencies (like Bitcoin) have an extremely high energy consumption due to their Proof-of-Work consensus mechanisms.
Training large AI models requires massive computational power and data center resources, leading to a significant carbon footprint.
The Internet of Things (IoT) contributes to a surge in electronic waste (e-waste) from the billions of short-lifecycle devices produced.
commonMistakes: Assuming 'digital' automatically means 'green' without considering the substantial energy and resource costs of the underlying infrastructure.
Overlooking the full lifecycle impact of devices, from resource extraction for manufacturing to their final disposal as e-waste.
Focusing solely on a technology's operational efficiency gains while ignoring the environmental cost of its development and deployment.
